name: Amos Luzon Development and Energy Group Ltd
summary: Amos Luzon Development and Energy Group Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a real estate development and construction company in Israel, Poland, Bulgaria, Slovakia, and Ukraine. It is also involved in the energy infrastructure business. The company undertakes offices and commercial center, residence, hotel, apartment, and other projects. It serves customers in the private and public sectors. The company was formerly known as U. Dori Group Ltd and changed its name to Amos Luzon Development and Energy Group Ltd in May 2016. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Jerusalem, Israel. Amos Luzon Development and Energy Group Ltd is a subsidiary of Gazit-Globe Israel (Development) Ltd.
